channel.title: JLT Spotlight (Facebook)
channel.description: Weekly Cruise, Hotel & Destination of the Week from JLT Group

item.title: ✨ Cruise of the Week (example)
item.description:
[EXAMPLE — JLT Spotlight test item. Safe to delete once the Sociamonials source is saved.]
✨ Cruise of the Week 🚢

Full spotlight on the website… link in the comments 💬
